sentences.target: Tu veux réellement quitter ton travail.

translations.fr: Tu veux réellement quitter ton travail.
translations.en: You really want to quit your job.
translations.es: De verdad quieres dejar tu trabajo.
translations.de: Du willst wirklich deinen Job kündigen.
translations.it: Vuoi davvero lasciare il tuo lavoro.
translations.zh-Hans: 你真的想辞掉你的工作。
translations.ru: Ты действительно хочешь уволиться с работы.
translations.pt: Você realmente quer pedir demissão do seu emprego.
translations.he: אתה באמת רוצה להתפטר מהעבודה שלך.
translations.vi: Bạn thật sự muốn nghỉ việc.
translations.nl: Je wilt echt je baan opzeggen.
translations.uk: Ти справді хочеш звільнитися з роботи.
translations.hu: Tényleg fel akarod mondani az állásodat.
translations.hi: तुम सच में अपनी नौकरी छोड़ना चाहते हो.
translations.el: Θέλεις πραγματικά να παραιτηθείς από τη δουλειά σου.
translations.nb: Du vil virkelig slutte i jobben din.
translations.id: Kamu benar-benar ingin keluar dari pekerjaanmu.
translations.sv: Du vill verkligen säga upp dig.
translations.da: Du vil virkelig sige op fra dit job.
translations.ja: 本当に仕事を辞めたい。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (2nd person singular, informal); refers to the addressee.
Main verb (present indicative, 2nd person singular); expresses desire and selects an infinitival complement.
Degree/intensifier adverb modifying the verbal phrase; asserts truth/intensity.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'veux' (controlled by the subject).
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular, masculine singular form) modifying 'travail'.
Common noun (masculine singular); object of 'quitter'.

translations.vi: Anh ấy thực sự bị ốm.

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (3rd person masculine singular).
Copular auxiliary (present indicative, 3rd person singular) linking subject to predicate.
Degree/intensifier adverb modifying the predicate.
Adjective used predicatively; denotes the subject’s state.

sentences.target: On a réellement besoin de ton aide.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ a ʁe.ɛl.mɑ̃ bə.zwɛ̃ də tɔ̃ ɛd/

translations.fr: On a réellement besoin de ton aide.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ a ʁe.ɛl.mɑ̃ bə.zwɛ̃ də tɔ̃ ɛd/
translations.it: Abbiamo davvero bisogno del tuo aiuto.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们真的需要你的帮助。
translations.pt: A gente realmente precisa da sua ajuda.
translations.he: אנחנו באמת צריכים את העזרה שלך.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thực sự cần sự giúp đỡ của bạn.
translations.nl: We hebben je hulp echt nodig.
translations.hi: हमें सच में तुम्हारी मदद की ज़रूरत है.
translations.ro: Chiar avem nevoie de ajutorul tău.
translations.da: Vi har virkelig brug for din hjælp.
translations.ja: 本当にあなたの助けが必要です。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/colloquial subject pronoun (syntactically 3rd person singular); often means 'we' in spoken French.
Main verb (present indicative, 3rd person singular) in the light-verb construction 'avoir besoin de'.
Degree/intensifier adverb modifying the predicate.
Common noun; head of the fixed expression 'avoir besoin de' meaning 'to need'.
Preposition introducing the complement of 'besoin'.
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular); used before vowel-initial feminine noun 'aide' (preferred over 'ta' for euphony).
Common noun (feminine); complement of the preposition 'de'.

sentences.target: Ce produit fonctionne réellement sur les taches.
sentences.reading: /sə pʁɔ.dɥi fɔ̃k.sjɔn ʁe.ɛl.mɑ̃ syʁ le taʃ/

translations.fr: Ce produit fonctionne réellement sur les taches.
translations.ipa: /sə pʁɔ.dɥi fɔ̃k.sjɔn ʁe.ɛl.mɑ̃ syʁ le taʃ/
translations.en: This product really works on stains.
translations.es: Este producto realmente funciona contra las manchas.
translations.de: Dieses Produkt wirkt wirklich gegen Flecken.
translations.it: Questo prodotto funziona davvero contro le macchie.
translations.ko: 이 제품은 얼룩에 정말 효과가 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这款产品对污渍确实有效。
translations.yue: 呢款產品對污漬真係有用。
translations.ru: Этот продукт действительно эффективен против пятен.
translations.pt: Este produto realmente funciona contra manchas.
translations.he: המוצר הזה באמת עובד על כתמים.
translations.tr: Bu ürün lekelerde gerçekten işe yarıyor.
translations.vi: Sản phẩm này thực sự hiệu quả với các vết bẩn.
translations.ar: هذا المنتج فعال حقًا ضد البقع.
translations.nl: Dit product werkt echt tegen vlekken.
translations.uk: Цей засіб справді працює проти плям.
translations.hu: Ez a termék tényleg hat a foltokra.
translations.hi: यह उत्पाद दागों पर सच में काम करता है.
translations.pl: Ten produkt naprawdę działa na plamy.
translations.el: Αυτό το προϊόν λειτουργεί πραγματικά κατά των λεκέδων.
translations.nb: Dette produktet fungerer virkelig mot flekker.
translations.id: Produk ini benar-benar ampuh untuk noda.
translations.sv: Den här produkten fungerar verkligen mot fläckar.
translations.ro: Acest produs chiar funcționează împotriva petelor.
translations.cs: Tento produkt opravdu funguje na skvrny.
translations.da: Dette produkt virker virkelig mod pletter.
translations.ja: この製品は本当にシミに効きます。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner (masculine singular) modifying 'produit'.
Common noun (masculine); subject of 'fonctionne'.
Intransitive main verb (present indicative, 3rd person singular); denotes operating correctly.
Degree/intensifier adverb modifying the verb.
Preposition introducing the prepositional phrase 'sur les taches'.
Definite article (plural) modifying 'taches'.
Common noun (plural); object of the preposition 'sur'.
